text: ✏️ Prompts

Prompt Management.Choose an option:

[📝 Create new prompt] [📚 Choose Existing] [⬅️ Main Menu]
📝 Create new prompt

Optimal!Let's get started creating your new custom prompt.What style do you want to give to the podcast?

[🎙️ Ironic] [🎓 Prof] [😂 Comedian]
🎙️ Ironic

Perfect, style set to "Ironic".Now, choose the length of the podcast:

[⚡ FAST (2-3 min)] [⏱️ MEDIUM (5-7 min)] [🕰️ LONG (10+ min)]
⚡ FAST

FAST mode selected.Do you want to add details or shall we proceed with the generation?

[🚀 Generate Now] [➕ Add Details]
🚀 Generate Now
Starting the podcast generation with your new Ironic style prompt!This will take a few moments.
Creation of the personalized prompt in Ironic style...
Writing the podcast script…
Script completed!Adaptation for the two speakers...
Text ready.Passing the script to the speech engine...
Text successfully generated.Now NotebookLM will give voice to the script...
Initializing the hosts' voices...
Speech synthesis in progress (speaker 1 and speaker 2)...
Mixing audio and adding background music...
Audio file export complete!
podcast_ironico_fast.mp3
